extraction.one_line_summary: PINOT attacked from 19-rider breakaway on final climb to Malbun, while HIGUITA gained yellow by 2 seconds over THOMAS after attacking with 2km remaining.
tactical_patterns: HIGUITA attacked with 2km remaining on final climb, gaining just enough time to take yellow by 2 seconds before final TT.
THOMAS attacked FUGLSANG in final 500m but couldn't close gap to HIGUITA, prioritizing podium position over yellow defense.
RODRÍGUEZ Óscar rode stealthily to second place, suggesting better form than indicated by starting position outside top-3.
EVENEPOEL's early move was immediately shut down by FUGLSANG's team, indicating yellow jersey protection trumped exploration attacks.

rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: attacked 2km from finish to gain exactly enough time (11 seconds on THOMAS) to take yellow by 2 seconds before final TT
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: attacked FUGLSANG in final 500m and described as strongest time trialist, clear favorite for overall after minimal time loss
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: won from 19-rider breakaway after three-year victory drought, second win in three months suggests resurgent form
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: dropped to 19 seconds down after being attacked by THOMAS in final 500m, unable to respond
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Óscar: positive: finished second stealthily from breakaway, significantly better performance than expected from starting position
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: third place from breakaway, strong climbing performance to hold position
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: neutral: held on for long time in breakaway before being distanced on final climb
